title: DMC-12 Common Definitions v0.2.0
description: Shared $defs (Money, FeePayee, FeeKind, PriceLine, FeeRule, OutTheDoorEstimate, NegotiationState, RejectionReason) referenced by quote, negotiation, and pricing-disclosure schemas. v0.2.0 adds OutTheDoorEstimate — the itemized out-the-door object carried on quote output (v0.5 cut).

FeeRule.description: Storage shape for an entry in fee_schedules.fee_lines. The compose step in get_pricing_disclosure converts a FeeRule into a PriceLine by either copying the fixed amount or computing rate × applicable_base. PriceLine is the OUTPUT shape (every line has a concrete amount); FeeRule is the INPUT shape (a line may carry either a fixed amount or a percentage rate).

rate.description: Decimal rate (e.g. 0.0685 = 6.85%). Applied to the rule's applicable_base.

applicable_base.description: Which prior PriceLine sum the rate is multiplied against. Only meaningful when rate is set.

OutTheDoorEstimate.description: Itemized, non-binding out-the-door estimate carried on quote output (v0.5). Flattens the standalone pricing_disclosure shape: the OTD total is promoted to top-level amount/currency, and the itemized price_lines + fees_total/taxes_total + disclosure metadata are carried alongside. subtotal is intentionally omitted — it is derivable as amount - taxes_total.amount. estimate is always true; quoted_price (on the quote, not here) remains the only committed figure.

amount.description: The out-the-door total (vehicle price + fees + taxes). Equals the sum of every price_lines amount.

price_lines.description: Itemized line items bridging quoted_price to amount: the vehicle_price line plus each fee/tax PriceLine.

fees_total.description: Sum of dealer-payee, non-vehicle fee lines (e.g. the doc fee).

estimate.description: Always true. The OTD is non-binding; only quoted_price is committed.

jurisdiction.description: Tax jurisdiction the estimate was computed for (e.g. US-UT).

as_of.description: When the estimate was composed (the fee schedule + tax rate in effect at this instant).

disclosure_form_url.description: Optional link to the jurisdiction's official OTD disclosure form.
